title: T-054 ‚Äî Raw-SQL migration runner + filename normalization (NNN-name.sql)
prompt:
# T-054 ‚Äî Raw-SQL migration runner + filename normalization

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` ‚Äî sections: ¬ß5 (DB scaffold), ¬ß8 (upgrade orchestration), ¬ß10 (R13 placeholder)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-consistency-audit.md` ¬ßA; carry-forward CF-4/CF-5/CF-23/CF-24
Severity: P0 (Wave-B blocker)

## Goal
Replace the drizzle-kit-only `packages/db/scripts/migrate.ts` with a real raw-SQL runner that applies the 12 hand-written `migrations/*.sql` files in canonical numeric order, idempotently, while recording state in a `public.schema_migrations(version, applied_at)` table. Normalize all migration filenames to `NNN-name.sql` (3-digit dash) so lexicographic and numeric sort agree. Update integration tests that reference renamed files.

## Implementation contract
Write `packages/db/scripts/migrate.ts` (or replace its body) so it:
1. Connects via `getOwnerConnection()` (NOT a raw superuser pool) ‚Äî reuses the T-045 pattern.
2. Creates `public.schema_migrations(version text PRIMARY KEY, applied_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())` if absent.
3. Reads `packages/db/migrations/*.sql`, sorts by leading numeric prefix `/^(\d+)/`, applies each missing version inside a single transaction per file, and INSERTs the version into `schema_migrations` on success.
4. Idempotent re-run is a no-op: `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db db:migrate` run twice in a row prints "already applied" for each file on the second run.
5. Rejects mixed-convention filenames at startup with a clear error message naming the offender.

Rename:
- `packages/db/migrations/0010_app_role.sql` ‚Üí `006-app-role.sql`
- `packages/db/migrations/0014_r13-placeholder-tables.sql` ‚Üí `014-r13-placeholder-tables.sql`

Update any test files that `readFileSync` these paths (search for `0010_app_role.sql` and `0014_r13-placeholder-tables.sql` across `packages/db/`).

Update `STATUS.md` migration ordering lock section to reflect the renames.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/scripts/migrate.ts [rewrite ‚Äî replace drizzle-kit shim with raw-SQL runner]
- packages/db/migrations/0010_app_role.sql [rename to 006-app-role.sql]
- packages/db/migrations/0014_r13-placeholder-tables.sql [rename to 014-r13-placeholder-tables.sql]
- packages/db/__tests__/app-role.test.ts (if exists) or packages/db/src/__tests__/app-role.test.ts [modify ‚Äî readFileSync path update]
- packages/db/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts [modify ‚Äî readFileSync path update]
- packages/db/__tests__/migrate-runner.integration.test.ts [create ‚Äî new integration test]
- packages/db/package.json [verify db:migrate script]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/00-foundation/STATUS.md [modify ‚Äî migration ordering lock section]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when db:migrate runs, then all 12 migrations apply in numeric order and schema_migrations contains 12 rows; AND Given renamed filenames, when ls | sort runs, then lex order matches numeric order.
2. Given an already-migrated DB, when db:migrate runs again, then it exits 0 with no DDL executed and reports already-applied per file.
3. Given a missing dependency, when the runner applies 014 before 002, then it fails with a clear error.
4. Given test path updates, when pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test runs, then all tests pass with zero regressions.
## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/__tests__/migrate-runner.integration.test.ts` boots a fresh test DB (or uses a transaction-rollback pattern), runs the runner, asserts `schema_migrations` row count = 12, then runs the runner again and asserts no new rows.
- Run `ls packages/db/migrations | sort` and pipe to a small assertion that the order is monotonic.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test` to confirm no regressions.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db db:migrate` twice in a row against a temp DB and capture stdout for AC2.

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT use `drizzle-kit push` or `drizzle-kit migrate` as the runner ‚Äî those operate on TS schema, not raw SQL.
- Do NOT rename any file outside the two specified.
- Do NOT modify migration SQL content (this task is rename + runner only).
- Do NOT skip the schema_migrations bookkeeping table.
- Do NOT run as superuser; use `getOwnerConnection()`.
- Do NOT block on T-053's symlink work ‚Äî runner uses absolute path resolution to `packages/db/migrations/`.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED runner integration test) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Replace drizzle-kit-only migrate.ts with a raw-SQL runner that sorts by numeric prefix, records state in schema_migrations, and is idempotent; rename two migration files to NNN-name.sql convention.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Implement scripts/migrate.ts as a real SQL runner (uses getOwnerConnection, schema_migrations bookkeeping, numeric-prefix sort, transactional per-file application, idempotent). Rename 0010_app_role.sql ‚Üí 006-app-role.sql and 0014_r13-placeholder-tables.sql ‚Üí 014-r13-placeholder-tables.sql. Update test readFileSync paths. Update STATUS.md migration ordering lock.

AC count consolidated from 5‚Üí4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
